title: mod_http2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.0.29-3]
- Resolves: RHEL-106263 - CVE-2025-49630 httpd: untrusted input from a client
  causes an assertion to fail in the Apache mod_proxy_http2 module
full_text:
[2.0.29-3]
- Resolves: RHEL-106263 - CVE-2025-49630 httpd: untrusted input from a client
  causes an assertion to fail in the Apache mod_proxy_http2 module

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20500-0.html
